description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a matte olive-green chassis and a black adjustable stock. The rifle features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for long-range precision shooting. The barrel is long and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, reducing noise and muzzle flash. The rifle is shown disassembled in some views, revealing a detachable box magazine loaded with rifle cartridges and a bolt assembly. The chassis includes a thumbhole grip and a cheek rest for ergonomic support. The overall design is robust, with visible metallic and polymer components, suitable for tactical or law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A modern bolt-action sniper rifle with an olive-green chassis, black adjustable stock, telescopic scope, and suppressor. It features a detachable magazine and ergonomic thumbhole grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, including the scope, suppressor, and stock.
description_view_1: Top-down disassembled view displaying the separated barrel, scope, magazine, bolt, and ammunition.
description_view_2: Side view with the rifle fully assembled and a disassembled set below, highlighting the magazine and ammunition.
description_view_3: Angled disassembled view showing the main body, barrel, scope, suppressor, and magazine components.
